scores.notes: Text accuracy suffers from misspellings (e.g., 'Jucvie Gerkold', 'Ur\Gornin'), wrong characters, and missing words. Numeric precision is poor with incorrect dates ('7°25-05-11', 'Marck z02F'), amounts ('34° dollars'), and garbled text ('AT¥03 Gor cz ant Theo ugh way'). Layout is mostly preserved but with some reading order issues. Completeness is decent but with minor omissions.
